TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 82 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: The managed care name (e.g., BEST FAMILY PLAN USA, PATIENTS FIRST OF THE MIDWEST) 

COMMENT: The value was chosen using the last-best method for values from the monthly TAF (calendar year).
